exercises.name: Quadruped Hip Abduction Hovers
exercises.alternateName: single leg adductor stretch to hip lift
exercises.description: Similar to abduction holds, but instead of holding, perform slow, controlled repetitions.

exercises.name: Quadruped Hip Circles
exercises.description: On all fours, lift one knee and draw large circles in the air with your hip. Keep your core engaged.

exercises.name: Quadruped Hold with Alternating Arm Lift
exercises.description:
1. Start on your hands and knees on the mat.

2. Point your toes into the floor, and lift your knees 1 inch off the floor. 

3. Keep your shoulders directly over top of your hands, hips over knees, and abdominals tight. 

4. While holding this position, fully extend one arm out in front of you while driving the thumb towards the ceiling. 

5. Try to keep balanced, and avoid rocking side to side. 

6. Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Quadruped Hold with Alternating Leg Lift
exercises.description:
1. Start on your hands and knees on the mat.

2. Point your toes into the floor, and lift your knees 1 inch off the floor. 

3. Keep your shoulders directly over top of your hands, hips over knees, and abdominals tight. 

4. While holding this position, fully extend one leg all the way out behind you. 

5. Try to keep balanced, and avoid rocking side to side.

6. Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Quadruped Hold with Opposite Arm and Leg Reach
exercises.description:
1. Start on your hands and knees on the mat.

2. Point your toes into the floor, and lift your knees 1 inch off the floor. 

3. Keep your shoulders directly over top of your hands, hips over knees, and abdominals tight. 

4. While holding this position, fully extend one leg all the way out behind you and the opposite arm all the way out in front of you.

5. Try to keep balanced, and avoid rocking side to side. 

6. Repeat on the other side

exercises.name: Quadruped Hold With Shoulder Taps
exercises.description:
Start in a tabletop position (hands under shoulders, knees under hips). 

Lift knees slightly off the ground. Tap one hand to the opposite shoulder, alternating sides, while maintaining a stable core.

exercises.name: Quadruped Scapular Push Up
exercises.description:
Start in a quadruped position with hands under shoulders and knees under hips. Keep your arms straight and engage your core. 

Without bending your elbows, protract and retract your shoulder blades, allowing your chest to sink slightly toward the floor during retraction and spreading the shoulder blades apart during protraction. 

Maintain control and avoid sagging in the lower back.

exercises.name: RB tricep supinated pulls in squat
RDL into a Bulgarian Split Squat - Show Up Fitness
exercises.description: RDL into a Bulgarian Split Squat - Show Up Fitness

exercises.name: Rear Foot Elevated Hip Flexor Stretch
exercises.alternateName: deep hip flexor and quad stretch
exercises.description:
1) Single leg kneel on a soft box, or bench, or place a folded towel under your knee. 

2) Slowly pull your foot in line vertically with alignment with your hip and knee. 

3) Tilt your hip back (aka tuck your butt by getting your abs and glutes active to posteriorly pelvic tilt). 

4) Slowly lean forward until you feel a light stretch at the front of your hips, and on your quads (front of thighs). 

5) Hold. 

6) Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Rear Foot Elevated Split Jump on Bench
exercises.description:
Start in a split stance with your rear foot elevated on a bench and your front foot on the floor. 

Bend your knees slightly, then explosively jump straight up, landing softly in the same split stance with the same foot positions. Repeat continuously.

exercises.name: Rear Pull Up
exercises.description:
1) Grab a pull up bar with an overhand grip with your arms straightened so that your body is hanging. 

2) Pull your body upwards until the bar is right behind your neck. 

3) Once your lats have completely contracted at the top, lower your body to the starting position.

exercises.name: Renegade Push Up Row
exercises.description:
1.Get into the top position of the pushup, holding on to a dumbbell in each hand with arms shoulder-width apart, arms straight.

2.Lower your body with chest touching the floor.

3.Push your body upwards and straighten your arms. At the top, pull one dumbell off the floor and push your elbow back, contracting your shoulder blades. 

4. Return to starting position. Repeat and alternate.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Anchored Chest Press
exercises.description:
1) Loop the band through a sturdy object at chest height. 

2) With your back to the object, grab a handle in each hand and step forward until there's no slack in the band. 

3) Your hands should be at your chest, elbows up 

4) Press the handles forward and together at the same time 

5) Return

exercises.name: Resistance Band Lateral Lunge
exercises.description: Anchor the band at chest height. Step back into a lunge while pulling the band toward your chest. Alternate sides.
